emails.subject: A couple a questions
emails.body: A couple a questions Good Morning Darling, Do you know when the UBS paydays are? We are just trying to figure out what to expect. Also, I need a copy of my signed agreement with UBS, the loan folks for my new condo want it. If you will fax it to me, but call me first so I can wait by the fax for it, I would be grateful. Thanks, Cara Freeland! ;)

emails.subject: RE: A couple a questions
emails.body: RE: A couple a questions Good morning Cara! Hope that you had a good weekend when do you move into the new condo? 1. UBS payrolls are the same as Enron (isn't that nice no change there)! 2. Julie Kearney should have a copy (I know she was keeping copies in case something happened to the fed ex packages). Let me know if she doesn't have for some reason. Have a great day! Amy To: Fitzpatrick, Amy

emails.subject: RE: A couple a questions
emails.body: I have asked her a couple of times, so if you have one that would be better. To: Semperger, Cara

emails.subject: RE: A couple a questions
emails.body: We don't have them here, but I will call Stamford and see what I can do. Thanks! Amy To: Fitzpatrick, Amy

emails.subject: RE: A couple a questions
emails.body: no worries,. I e-mailed julie again Just hold off for now. I need to get my loan approved and my bonus in hand before I can move in, I am anxious! woohoo! To: Semperger, Cara

emails.subject: RE: A couple a questions
emails.body: I spoke with Julie and asked her again as well....my only concern with UBS is that they are swamped at the moment, and these requests usually take a day or two to turnaround (I have put the request to UBS as well so lets see who does it first!). Let me know if you get it from Julie or if I receive from UBS first, will give you a call to fax. Amy To: Fitzpatrick, Amy

emails.subject: RE: A couple a questions
emails.body: she said she would get it for me after this conference call. Are there going to be more Enron layoffs? To: Semperger, Cara

emails.subject: RE: A couple a questions
emails.body: I really haven't heard anything.. we have been so out of the loop on Enron matters (conflict of interest and just really busy!!). A To: Fitzpatrick, Amy
